name: Chocoholic's Quick-Fix Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Mix the chocolate wafers and melted butter together.
3. Press the mixture into the bottom of a prepared springform pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the egg yolks with softened cream cheese, 1/4 cup sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
6. Gradually add in the melted chocolate chips to the mixture.
7. Beat the egg whites separately until stiff peaks form.
8. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the chocolate mixture.
9. Add the remaining sugar and mix well.
10. Fold in the whipped heavy cream until just combined.
11. Pour the filling over the crust in the springform pan.
12. Freeze for several hours or overnight before serving.
13. Decorate with additional whipped cream, if desired.
